name: Support Ticket Classifier
description: Analyzes support ticket text and classifies it into one of four predefined categories: billing, technical, account, or general
task_description:
Classify this support ticket into one of these categories:
- billing
- technical
- account
- general

Ticket:
I was charged twice for my subscription this month. Please refund the duplicate charge.

Return only the category name.

**IMPORTANT: The task provides these input variables:**
- `ticket_text` (str)

Your workflow MUST use these exact variable names: ticket_text

**CRITICAL - OUTPUT FORMAT (EXACT STRUCTURE REQUIRED):**
Your activity must return this structure:
```json
billing
```

**Rules:**
- Match this structure (field names, nesting, types) EXACTLY
- Values will vary by instance, but structure stays the same
- Do NOT add extra fields
- Do NOT change field names
reasoning: This workflow uses a single LLM-based classification activity since it requires semantic understanding of the ticket content to determine the appropriate category. The task requires returning only the category name as a simple string, making this a straightforward sequence pattern. I use the llm_classify template as inspiration but customize it to return just the category string rather than a complex object, as specified in the requirements.
